name: banana walnut oatmeal
steps: ['bring water to a boil', 'stir in oats and cook for 5 minutes', 'mash in the banana', 'top with chopped walnuts and a drizzle of honey']
description: a warm, naturally sweet bowl of oatmeal with banana and toasted walnuts.

name: naina s stuffed chicken
steps: ['mix the minced meat with spices', 'butterfly the chicken breasts', 'stuff with the spiced mince and a hard-boiled egg', 'secure with toothpicks', 'sear on all sides', 'bake until cooked through']
description: chicken breasts stuffed with spiced mincemeat, potato and egg.
ingredients: ['chicken', 'mincemeat', 'potato', 'onions', 'garam masala powder', 'red chili powder', 'turmeric powder', 'tomatoes', 'oil', 'ginger-garlic paste', 'lemon juice', 'salt', 'hard-boiled egg', 'fresh coriander leaves']

name: 15 minute vegan tomato pasta
steps: ['cook pasta until al dente', 'simmer crushed tomatoes with garlic and basil', 'toss pasta with the sauce and olive oil']
description: a quick weeknight vegan pasta with a simple garlic tomato sauce.

name: low carb cauliflower rice stir fry
steps: ['pulse cauliflower into rice-sized pieces', 'saute garlic and ginger in sesame oil', 'add cauliflower and mixed vegetables', 'stir fry for 6 minutes and season with soy sauce']
description: a light, low-carb stir fry using cauliflower instead of rice.

name: onion y chicken and rice
steps: ['brown the chicken thighs', 'soften the onions in the same pan', 'stir in rice and broth', 'return chicken to the pan', 'cover and simmer until rice is tender']
description: a comforting one-pot chicken and rice cooked with plenty of onions.

name: gluten free flourless chocolate cake
steps: ['melt chocolate with butter', 'whisk in sugar and eggs', 'fold in cocoa powder', 'pour into a lined pan', 'bake until just set and cool before serving']
description: a dense, fudgy flourless chocolate cake that is naturally gluten free.

name: easy vegetarian black bean chili
steps: ['saute onion, pepper and garlic', 'add spices and toast briefly', 'stir in black beans and tomatoes', 'simmer for 25 minutes', 'serve topped with cilantro']
description: a hearty meatless chili built on black beans and warm spices.

name: eggs cheese and tomato breakfast scramble
steps: ['whisk the eggs with salt and pepper', 'cook the tomatoes in butter until soft', 'pour in the eggs and gently scramble', 'fold in shredded cheese off the heat']
description: a fast, protein-rich scramble with eggs, melty cheese and tomatoes.

name: best carrot soup
steps: ['soften onion in olive oil', 'add carrots and broth', 'simmer until carrots are tender', 'blend until smooth', 'season and finish with a swirl of cream']
description: a smooth, lightly sweet carrot soup that is comforting and healthy.

name: carrot tahini sandwich
steps: ['whisk tahini with lemon juice and water', 'grate the carrots', 'toss carrots with the tahini dressing', 'pile onto bread with greens and close the sandwich']
description: a fresh vegan sandwich of grated carrot in a lemony tahini dressing.

name: banana walnut bread
steps: ['mash the ripe bananas', 'cream butter and sugar', 'mix in eggs and bananas', 'fold in flour and walnuts', 'bake in a loaf pan until a skewer comes out clean']
description: a moist banana bread studded with walnuts, great for using up ripe bananas.

name: slow cooker stuffing
steps: ['saute onion and celery in butter', 'toss bread cubes with the vegetables and herbs', 'pour over the broth and beaten eggs', 'transfer to the slow cooker', 'cook on low for 4 hours']
description: a hands-off herbed bread stuffing made entirely in the slow cooker.
